about.title: About me
about.paragraph1: I'm a Full-Stack Developer with hands-on experience building scalable, well-structured solutions. I apply patterns like Atomic Design and Clean Architecture to build robust, maintainable applications.
about.paragraph2: I'm currently in my 4rd semester of Software Analysis and Development, focused on UI/UX best practices and code quality. I'm always looking to grow and deliver clean, efficient, high-impact software.
